title: Crazy Adventure
description: A modded modpack made just for the server crazy adventure
body:
# 🇬🇧 Crazy Adventure — Private Modded Server Pack

This modpack is designed for a **private Minecraft server** and updates automatically when new versions are released.  
It brings together a variety of gameplay, decoration, and exploration mods inspired by the *Crazy Town* series.

## 🧩 Main Features
- Automatic updates for easy maintenance  
- A mix of adventure, exploration, and building mods  
- Voice chat support for multiplayer interaction  
- Hidden player names for immersive roleplay  
- Corpse recovery system on death  
- A custom server experience hosted at `88.178.107.48:1000`

## 🧱 Included Mods (Credits)
In compliance with Modrinth’s rules, here are the links to the original mod pages:  
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)  
- [Corpse](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse)  
- [Hidden Names](https://modrinth.com/mod/hidden-names)  
- [Camera Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-mod)  
- [Biomes O’ Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)  
- [Crazy Things (CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crazythings)

This pack is **not intended for public distribution** and is shared only through a **private link** for personal or community use.

---

# 🇫🇷 Crazy Adventure — Modpack privé pour serveur Minecraft

Ce modpack a été conçu pour un **serveur privé** et se met à jour automatiquement.  
Il regroupe différents mods d’aventure, d’exploration et de construction, inspirés par la série *Crazy Town*.

## 🔹 Fonctionnalités principales :
- Mise à jour automatique du pack  
- Système de chat vocal entre joueurs  
- Noms cachés pour plus de réalisme en RP  
- Système de récupération du corps après la mort  
- Nouveaux biomes, objets et structures  
- Connexion au serveur : `88.178.107.48:1000`

## 🔹 Crédits des mods :
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)  
- [Corpse](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse)  
- [Hidden Names](https://modrinth.com/mod/hidden-names)  
- [Camera Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-mod)  
- [Biomes O’ Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)  
- [Crazy Things](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crazythings)
